function solve(piles) {
    piles.sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const n = piles.length;
    const m = n / 3;
    let sum = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        sum += piles[n - 2 * (i + 1)];
    }
    return sum;
}

}
